title: Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Anandeswaram Sree Mahadeva Kshethram (Malayalam: ആനന്ദേശ്വര൦ ശ്രീമഹാദേവ ക്ഷേത്ര൦) is one of the oldest temples in Pandanad village.
overview.description: Anandeswaram Sree Mahadeva Kshethram (Malayalam: ആനന്ദേശ്വര൦ ശ്രീമഹാദേവ ക്ഷേത്ര൦) is one of the oldest temples in Pandanad village. It is located at Pandanad in Chengannur taluk of Alappuzha district in the south Indian state of Kerala. The temple is situated between Chengannur, and Mannar. Anandeswaram Sree Mahadeva Kshethram is a Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sree Venu Gopala Swamy, Purakkad
topPlaces.description: Sree Venu Gopala Swamy Temple, Purakkad is one of the oldest Gowda Saraswath temples in the world. The main deity is Sree Venu Gopala Swamy.

topPlaces.name: Thottappally Spillway
topPlaces.description: Thottappally Spillway is Kuttanad's drain-way out to the Arabian Sea. The spillway splits Thottappally Lake with the fresh water part to the east and saline Thottappally river mouth to the west merging with the Arabian Sea.

topPlaces.name: Kunnumma
topPlaces.description: Kunnumma is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Karuvatta
topPlaces.description: Karuvatta is a village in the Alappuzha District of the Kerala region of India. It lies between Haripad and Thottappally in Alappuzha, on National Highway 66.

topPlaces.name: Karumady
topPlaces.description: Karumady is a village three km east of Ambalappuzha in Alappuzha district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is famous for Karumady Kuttan, the eleventh century black granite statue of Sri Buddha.

topPlaces.name: Pallana
topPlaces.description: Pallana is a village near Haripad on the shore of Arabian Sea. It is also alongside the River Pallana.

topPlaces.name: Alappuzha East
topPlaces.description: Alappuzha East is a village in Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. It is part of Alappuzha municipality.

topPlaces.name: Ambalappuzha Sree Krishna Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Ambalappuzha Sree Krishna Swamy Temple is an Indian Hindu temple dedicated to Krishna at Ambalappuzha in Alappuzha district of Kerala. The temple is believed to have been built during 15th century CE by the local ruler Chembakasserry Pooradam Thirunal-Devanarayanan Thampuran.

items.note: Sree Venu Gopala Swamy Temple, Purakkad is one of the oldest Gowda Saraswath temples in the world. The main deity is Sree Venu Gopala Swamy.

Thottappally Spillway is Kuttanad's drain-way out to the Arabian Sea. The spillway splits Thottappally Lake with the fresh water part to the east and saline Thottappally river mouth to the west merging with the Arabian Sea.

Pallana is a village near Haripad on the shore of Arabian Sea. It is also alongside the River Pallana.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anandeshwaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sree Venu Gopala Swamy, Purakkad, Thottappally Spillway, Kunnumma, Karuvatta, Karumady.
